name: the-ancestors-tale-a-pilgrimage-to-the-dawn-of-evolution
description: Richard Dawkins' grand pilgrimage backward through evolution — 40 rendezvous points from humans to the dawn of life, exploring common ancestry, deep time, and the evidence for natural selection.
useCase: Understand evolution, common ancestry, deep time, and the overwhelming evidence for natural selection through Dawkins' pilgrimage metaphor.
knownRisks: Long and detailed — may be overwhelming for casual readers
Some scientific concepts require basic biology knowledge
